arts.ttl: Team News: Patrick Dorgu, Ayden Heaven decisions made as Man United confirm XI for Leicester battle in FA Cup
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting XI for Friday night's FA Cup fourth-round contest with Leicester City at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Leicester: FA Cup fourth round – live
arts.sum: FA Cup fourth round, 8pm GMT kick-off at Old Trafford Live scores | Weekend FA Cup preview | And email Tim Leicester (4-2-3-1) Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Okoli, Thomas; Ndidi, Soumaré; Ayew, El Khanouss, De Cordova-Reid; Daka. Subs: Stolarczyk, Coulibaly, Coady, Skipp, Winks, Mavididi, Buonanotte, McAteer, Monga, Evans. Man United (3-4-2-1) Onana; Mazraoui, Maguire, Yoro; Dalot, Ugarte, Fernandes, Dorgu; Amad, Mainoo; Højlund. Subs: Graczyk, Heaven, Lindelof, De Ligt, Collyer, Casemiro, Eriksen, Garnacho, Zirkzee. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Manchester United with Jamie Vardy missing as four changes made
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Okoli, Thomas; Ndidi, Soumare; Ayew, El Khannouss, De Cordova-Reid; Daka. And the attacking line of three behind the striker remains the same for the third game, with Jordan Ayew on the right, Bobby De Cordova-Reid on the left, and Bilal El Khannouss in the middle.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes honest admission about Marcus Rashford after Manchester United exit
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford will be keen to get his career back on track at Aston Villa after arriving on loan from Man United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Leicester: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy returns to Old Trafford on Friday evening as his Leicester City side look to knock Manchester United out of the FA Cup fourth round. This will be the third time Leicester travel to Old Trafford this season, having conceded eight across two previous defeats in the Carabao Cup and Premier League, with expectations super low following last weekend's 4-0 humbling at Everton.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Leicester City - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Red Devils look to advance to fifth round
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the fourth round FA Cup tie between Manchester United and Leicester City as the Red Devils seek to book a spot in the fifth round.

arts.ttl: Is there extra time and penalties in Man United vs Leicester FA Cup tie?
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as Ruben Amorim looks to guide United to the fifth round of the FA Cup with a win over Leicester City

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy is making three statements with timing of Leicester City decision
arts.sum: While Ruud van Nistelrooy was keen to emphasise that the inclusion of talented teenagers Jeremy Monga and Jake Evans in the squad at Manchester United was merited, it does also allow the Leicester City manager to make a few points. Monga may be 15, but he’s “being really effective in deciding games” at Premier League 2 level, van Nistelrooy said, the manager adding that “you see a physical profile that allows that and you see a mental profile that allows that”.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Amorim FUMES with Man Utd over broken transfer promises
arts.sum: Manager Ruben Amorim is frustrated with certain members of Manchester United ’s hierarchy over their handling of key transfer dealings, particularly Casemiro ’s stay and the delayed departure of Marcus Rashford, sources close to the Red Devils have told FootballTransfers. Amorim, who took charge at Old Trafford ahead of the 2024/25 season, had been keen on reshaping the squad to fit his tactical vision – starting in January.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Leicester City - TV channel, live stream, kick-off time
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy will be hoping for a welcome break from the fight to keep Leicester City in the Premier League when he returns to Old Trafford on Friday for an FA Cup fourth-round tie against Manchester United. One of the few shining lights of Amorim's brief tenure was United's third-round victory at Arsenal, and van Nistelrooy was in charge when they knocked Leicester out of the Carabao Cup.
